requirement_topic.en: EMC Emissions — CISPR 15 (UAE.S / GSO Adoption, ECAS)
requirement_topic.zh: EMC 发射——CISPR 15（UAE.S / GSO 采用，ECAS）
requirement_topic.zht: EMC 發射——CISPR 15（UAE.S / GSO 採用，ECAS）

summary.en: LED luminaires placed on the UAE market must meet electromagnetic compatibility (EMC) emission requirements as assessed under the Emirates Conformity Assessment Scheme (ECAS) administered by MoIAT (incorporating the former ESMA). The applicable UAE.S / GSO standard for lighting emissions adopts CISPR 15 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment), covering conducted emissions on the mains supply terminals (150 kHz–30 MHz) and radiated emissions (30 MHz–300 MHz). Test reports must be issued or accepted by a conformity assessment body recognised by MoIAT/ESMA, and the EMC evidence forms part of the ECAS technical file. Luminaires rated for the UAE 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid (50 Hz, the same frequency as China, but a different voltage from China's 220/380 V) must be evaluated at the UAE supply conditions. Luminaires with integrated wireless functionality (e.g., Bluetooth dimming, Wi-Fi smart lighting) are additionally subject to UAE telecom-type-approval requirements (TDRA) for the radio module.
summary.zh: 在阿联酋市场销售的 LED 灯具须满足电磁兼容（EMC）发射要求，并依据由 MoIAT（已并入原 ESMA）管理的阿联酋合格评定计划（ECAS）评估。适用于照明发射的 UAE.S / GSO 标准采用 CISPR 15（电气照明及类似设备无线电干扰特性的限值和测量方法），涵盖电源端传导发射（150 kHz–30 MHz）及辐射发射（30 MHz–300 MHz）。检测报告须由 MoIAT/ESMA 认可的合格评定机构出具或接受，EMC 证据构成 ECAS 技术文件的组成部分。按阿联酋 230/400 V、50 Hz 电网额定的灯具（50 Hz 与中国频率相同，但电压不同于中国的 220/380 V）须按阿联酋供电条件评估。集成无线功能的灯具（如蓝牙调光、Wi-Fi 智能照明）的无线电模块还须满足阿联酋电信型号核准要求（TDRA）。
summary.zht: 在阿聯酋市場銷售的 LED 燈具須滿足電磁兼容（EMC）發射要求，並依據由 MoIAT（已併入原 ESMA）管理的阿聯酋合格評定計劃（ECAS）評估。適用於照明發射的 UAE.S / GSO 標準採用 CISPR 15（電氣照明及類似設備無線電干擾特性的限值和測量方法），涵蓋電源端傳導發射（150 kHz–30 MHz）及輻射發射（30 MHz–300 MHz）。檢測報告須由 MoIAT/ESMA 認可的合格評定機構出具或接受，EMC 證據構成 ECAS 技術文件的組成部分。按阿聯酋 230/400 V、50 Hz 電網額定的燈具（50 Hz 與中國頻率相同，但電壓不同於中國的 220/380 V）須按阿聯酋供電條件評估。集成無線功能的燈具（如藍牙調光、Wi-Fi 智能照明）的無線電模組還須滿足阿聯酋電信型號核准要求（TDRA）。

standards_or_laws: UAE.S / GSO standard adopting CISPR 15 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (assessed under ECAS, MoIAT/ESMA)
Emirates Conformity Assessment Scheme (ECAS) — EMC evidence required in the technical file

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 17743-2017 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment), which is technically aligned with CISPR 15. For luminaires sold in China, GB 17743 compliance is required as part of CCC certification (which covers both safety and EMC for relevant product categories). Testing must be conducted at CNAS/CMA-accredited laboratories in China. Chinese CCC EMC test reports are not automatically accepted for UAE ECAS purposes unless issued or recognised by a conformity assessment body accepted by MoIAT/ESMA.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 17743-2017（电气照明及类似设备的无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法），技术上与 CISPR 15 对齐。在中国销售的灯具须符合 GB 17743，这是相关产品类别 CCC 认证（涵盖安全和 EMC）的组成部分。检测须在中国 CNAS/CMA 认可实验室进行。中国 CCC EMC 检测报告除非由 MoIAT/ESMA 接受的合格评定机构出具或认可，否则不会自动被阿联酋 ECAS 接受。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 17743-2017（電氣照明及類似設備的無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法），技術上與 CISPR 15 對齊。在中國銷售的燈具須符合 GB 17743，這是相關產品類別 CCC 認證（涵蓋安全和 EMC）的組成部分。檢測須在中國 CNAS/CMA 認可實驗室進行。中國 CCC EMC 檢測報告除非由 MoIAT/ESMA 接受的合格評定機構出具或認可，否則不會自動被阿聯酋 ECAS 接受。

standards_or_laws: GB 17743-2017 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (SAC/SAMR, aligned with CISPR 15)

gap.en: The UAE CISPR 15-based emission limits and the CN GB 17743 limits are both derived from CISPR 15 and are largely harmonized. Key gaps: (1) EMC evidence must be presented within the ECAS conformity assessment and accepted by a MoIAT/ESMA-recognised conformity assessment body — a CN CCC report alone may not be accepted without recognition; (2) the product must be evaluated for the UAE 230 V, 50 Hz single-phase / 400 V three-phase supply (same 50 Hz as China, but China's nominal voltage is 220/380 V — confirm rated voltage and any mains-related test conditions match the UAE supply); (3) if the luminaire incorporates wireless functionality, separate UAE telecom type approval (TDRA) applies to the radio module in addition to ECAS; (4) the certificate is held by an in-country importer/registrant and goods cannot clear customs at ports such as Jebel Ali (Dubai) or Khalifa (Abu Dhabi) without a valid Certificate of Conformity.
gap.zh: 阿联酋基于 CISPR 15 的发射限值与中国 GB 17743 限值均源自 CISPR 15，基本协调。主要差距：（1）EMC 证据须在 ECAS 合格评定内提交，并由 MoIAT/ESMA 认可的合格评定机构接受——仅凭中国 CCC 报告若未获认可可能不被接受；（2）产品须按阿联酋 230 V、50 Hz 单相 / 400 V 三相供电评估（与中国同为 50 Hz，但中国标称电压为 220/380 V——请确认额定电压及任何与电源相关的试验条件与阿联酋供电一致）；（3）若灯具集成无线功能，则其无线电模块除 ECAS 外还须取得阿联酋电信型号核准（TDRA）；（4）证书由在地进口商/注册人持有，缺少有效符合性证书货物无法在 Jebel Ali（迪拜）或 Khalifa（阿布扎比）等口岸清关。
gap.zht: 阿聯酋基於 CISPR 15 的發射限值與中國 GB 17743 限值均源自 CISPR 15，基本協調。主要差距：（1）EMC 證據須在 ECAS 合格評定內提交，並由 MoIAT/ESMA 認可的合格評定機構接受——僅憑中國 CCC 報告若未獲認可可能不被接受；（2）產品須按阿聯酋 230 V、50 Hz 單相 / 400 V 三相供電評估（與中國同為 50 Hz，但中國標稱電壓為 220/380 V——請確認額定電壓及任何與電源相關的試驗條件與阿聯酋供電一致）；（3）若燈具集成無線功能，則其無線電模組除 ECAS 外還須取得阿聯酋電信型號核准（TDRA）；（4）證書由在地進口商/註冊人持有，缺少有效符合性證書貨物無法在 Jebel Ali（迪拜）或 Khalifa（阿布扎比）等口岸清關。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EMC emission compliance assessed under ECAS (MoIAT/ESMA); the applicable UAE.S / GSO standard adopts CISPR 15 for lighting emissions
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 17743-2017 compliance required as part of CCC certification for luminaires sold in China

source.publisher: Ministry of Industry and Advanced Technology (MoIAT, incorporating former ESMA), UAE

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC emission compliance for LED luminaires in the UAE is assessed under ECAS, with the applicable UAE.S / GSO standard adopting CISPR 15. Emission limits are broadly harmonized with CN GB 17743 (both CISPR 15-derived), but the EMC evidence must be accepted within the ECAS process by a MoIAT/ESMA-recognised conformity assessment body, and the product must be evaluated at the UAE 230/400 V, 50 Hz supply (same 50 Hz as China, different voltage from China's 220/380 V). Smart luminaires with wireless functions additionally require UAE telecom type approval (TDRA).
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 阿联酋 LED 灯具的 EMC 发射合规依据 ECAS 评估，适用的 UAE.S / GSO 标准采用 CISPR 15。发射限值与中国 GB 17743（均源自 CISPR 15）基本协调，但 EMC 证据须在 ECAS 流程中由 MoIAT/ESMA 认可的合格评定机构接受，且产品须按阿联酋 230/400 V、50 Hz 供电评估（与中国同为 50 Hz，电压不同于中国的 220/380 V）。集成无线功能的智能灯具还须取得阿联酋电信型号核准（TDRA）。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 阿聯酋 LED 燈具的 EMC 發射合規依據 ECAS 評估，適用的 UAE.S / GSO 標準採用 CISPR 15。發射限值與中國 GB 17743（均源自 CISPR 15）基本協調，但 EMC 證據須在 ECAS 流程中由 MoIAT/ESMA 認可的合格評定機構接受，且產品須按阿聯酋 230/400 V、50 Hz 供電評估（與中國同為 50 Hz，電壓不同於中國的 220/380 V）。集成無線功能的智能燈具還須取得阿聯酋電信型號核准（TDRA）。

requirement_topic.en: EMC Immunity — IEC 61547 (UAE.S / GSO Adoption, ECAS)
requirement_topic.zh: EMC 抗扰度——IEC 61547（UAE.S / GSO 采用，ECAS）
requirement_topic.zht: EMC 抗擾度——IEC 61547（UAE.S / GSO 採用，ECAS）

summary.en: LED luminaires placed on the UAE market must demonstrate adequate electromagnetic immunity in their intended environment as assessed under ECAS (MoIAT/ESMA). The applicable UAE.S / GSO standard for lighting immunity adopts IEC 61547 (Equipment for general lighting purposes — EMC immunity requirements). Tests include electrostatic discharge (ESD, IEC 61000-4-2), electrical fast transient/burst (IEC 61000-4-4), surge (IEC 61000-4-5), conducted RF disturbances (IEC 61000-4-6), power frequency magnetic field (IEC 61000-4-8), and voltage dips/interruptions (IEC 61000-4-11). Immunity test reports form part of the ECAS technical file and must be accepted by a MoIAT/ESMA-recognised conformity assessment body. Voltage-dip and interruption tests should reflect the UAE 230/400 V, 50 Hz supply (same 50 Hz as China, different voltage from China's 220/380 V).
summary.zh: 在阿联酋市场销售的 LED 灯具须在预期环境中证明具备足够电磁抗扰度，并依据 ECAS（MoIAT/ESMA）评估。适用于照明抗扰度的 UAE.S / GSO 标准采用 IEC 61547（一般照明设备——EMC 抗扰度要求）。试验项目包括静电放电（ESD，IEC 61000-4-2）、电快速瞬变/脉冲群（IEC 61000-4-4）、浪涌（IEC 61000-4-5）、传导射频骚扰（IEC 61000-4-6）、工频磁场（IEC 61000-4-8）及电压暂降/中断（IEC 61000-4-11）。抗扰度检测报告构成 ECAS 技术文件的组成部分，须由 MoIAT/ESMA 认可的合格评定机构接受。电压暂降及中断试验应反映阿联酋 230/400 V、50 Hz 供电（与中国同为 50 Hz，电压不同于中国的 220/380 V）。
summary.zht: 在阿聯酋市場銷售的 LED 燈具須在預期環境中證明具備足夠電磁抗擾度，並依據 ECAS（MoIAT/ESMA）評估。適用於照明抗擾度的 UAE.S / GSO 標準採用 IEC 61547（一般照明設備——EMC 抗擾度要求）。試驗項目包括靜電放電（ESD，IEC 61000-4-2）、電快速瞬變/脈衝群（IEC 61000-4-4）、浪湧（IEC 61000-4-5）、傳導射頻騷擾（IEC 61000-4-6）、工頻磁場（IEC 61000-4-8）及電壓暫降/中斷（IEC 61000-4-11）。抗擾度檢測報告構成 ECAS 技術文件的組成部分，須由 MoIAT/ESMA 認可的合格評定機構接受。電壓暫降及中斷試驗應反映阿聯酋 230/400 V、50 Hz 供電（與中國同為 50 Hz，電壓不同於中國的 220/380 V）。

standards_or_laws: UAE.S / GSO standard adopting IEC 61547 — Equipment for general lighting purposes — EMC immunity requirements (assessed under ECAS, MoIAT/ESMA)
Emirates Conformity Assessment Scheme (ECAS) — immunity evidence required in the technical file

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB/T 18595-2014 (General requirements for the electromagnetic immunity of lighting equipment), which is technically equivalent to IEC 61547:2009. GB/T 18595 is a recommended standard (T = tuijian, recommended) and is less strictly enforced than the CN emissions standard GB 17743. CCC certification for CN luminaires generally focuses more on safety and emissions than immunity. A product tested to the IEC 61547 immunity levels typically demonstrates performance beyond what is routinely enforced in the CN market.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB/T 18595-2014（照明设备的电磁抗扰度要求），技术上等同于 IEC 61547:2009。GB/T 18595 为推荐性标准（T = 推荐），执行力度弱于中国发射标准 GB 17743。针对中国灯具的 CCC 认证通常更侧重安全和发射而非抗扰度。按 IEC 61547 抗扰度等级检测的产品通常表明性能超出中国市场通常执行的要求。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB/T 18595-2014（照明設備的電磁抗擾度要求），技術上等同於 IEC 61547:2009。GB/T 18595 為推薦性標準（T = 推薦），執行力度弱於中國發射標準 GB 17743。針對中國燈具的 CCC 認證通常更側重安全和發射而非抗擾度。按 IEC 61547 抗擾度等級檢測的產品通常表明性能超出中國市場通常執行的要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18595-2014 — General requirements for the electromagnetic immunity of lighting equipment (SAC/SAMR — recommended standard, aligned with IEC 61547:2009)

gap.en: The UAE requires immunity evidence within the ECAS conformity assessment against the applicable UAE.S / GSO standard adopting IEC 61547. CN immunity testing under GB/T 18595 is a recommended standard and not universally enforced for all luminaire categories. Because both the UAE standard and GB/T 18595 share the IEC 61547 technical base, a product already tested to IEC 61547 generally meets or exceeds CN requirements — the practical gap is primarily a documentation/recognition gap: the ECAS file must contain immunity evidence accepted by a MoIAT/ESMA-recognised conformity assessment body, whereas CN CCC documentation may not include equivalent immunity reports. Voltage-dip/interruption conditions should reflect the UAE 230 V / 50 Hz supply (same 50 Hz as China, different voltage from China's 220 V).
gap.zh: 阿联酋要求在 ECAS 合格评定内提供依据采用 IEC 61547 的适用 UAE.S / GSO 标准的抗扰度证据。中国 GB/T 18595 下的抗扰度测试为推荐性标准，并非对所有灯具类别普遍执行。由于阿联酋标准与 GB/T 18595 共用 IEC 61547 技术基础，已按 IEC 61547 测试的产品通常能满足或超越中国要求——实际差距主要为文件/认可差距：ECAS 文件须包含由 MoIAT/ESMA 认可的合格评定机构接受的抗扰度证据，而中国 CCC 文件可能不含等效抗扰度报告。电压暂降/中断条件应反映阿联酋 230 V / 50 Hz 供电（与中国同为 50 Hz，电压不同于中国的 220 V）。
gap.zht: 阿聯酋要求在 ECAS 合格評定內提供依據採用 IEC 61547 的適用 UAE.S / GSO 標準的抗擾度證據。中國 GB/T 18595 下的抗擾度測試為推薦性標準，並非對所有燈具類別普遍執行。由於阿聯酋標準與 GB/T 18595 共用 IEC 61547 技術基礎，已按 IEC 61547 測試的產品通常能滿足或超越中國要求——實際差距主要為文件/認可差距：ECAS 文件須包含由 MoIAT/ESMA 認可的合格評定機構接受的抗擾度證據，而中國 CCC 文件可能不含等效抗擾度報告。電壓暫降/中斷條件應反映阿聯酋 230 V / 50 Hz 供電（與中國同為 50 Hz，電壓不同於中國的 220 V）。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EMC immunity evidence required within ECAS (MoIAT/ESMA); the applicable UAE.S / GSO standard adopts IEC 61547 for lighting immunity
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended — GB/T 18595-2014 is a recommended (non-mandatory) standard; immunity testing is not universally enforced for all luminaire categories under CCC

source.publisher: Ministry of Industry and Advanced Technology (MoIAT, incorporating former ESMA), UAE

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] LED luminaires must demonstrate EMC immunity within the UAE ECAS assessment, against the applicable UAE.S / GSO standard adopting IEC 61547. Chinese GB/T 18595 is a recommended standard and does not substitute for the UAE immunity evidence requirement. The technical content is largely harmonized with IEC 61547, so products already tested to GB/T 18595 may have a reduced re-testing burden, but the ECAS technical file must contain adequate immunity evidence accepted by a MoIAT/ESMA-recognised body, evaluated at the UAE 230/400 V, 50 Hz supply.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] LED 灯具须在阿联酋 ECAS 评估内证明 EMC 抗扰度，依据采用 IEC 61547 的适用 UAE.S / GSO 标准。中国 GB/T 18595 为推荐性标准，不可替代阿联酋抗扰度证据要求。技术内容与 IEC 61547 基本协调，因此已按 GB/T 18595 测试的产品可能减少重新测试负担，但 ECAS 技术文件须包含由 MoIAT/ESMA 认可机构接受的充分抗扰度证据，并按阿联酋 230/400 V、50 Hz 供电评估。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] LED 燈具須在阿聯酋 ECAS 評估內證明 EMC 抗擾度，依據採用 IEC 61547 的適用 UAE.S / GSO 標準。中國 GB/T 18595 為推薦性標準，不可替代阿聯酋抗擾度證據要求。技術內容與 IEC 61547 基本協調，因此已按 GB/T 18595 測試的產品可能減少重新測試負擔，但 ECAS 技術文件須包含由 MoIAT/ESMA 認可機構接受的充分抗擾度證據，並按阿聯酋 230/400 V、50 Hz 供電評估。
